variants.label: Variant 1
variants.focus: Optimize for rapid delivery with a single cohesive surface.
variants.architecture: Direct App Router implementation with compact orchestration support.

variants.label: Variant 2
variants.focus: Balance delivery speed with maintainable boundaries.
variants.architecture: Layered flow with explicit orchestration and clearer separation of runtime data.
variants.tradeoff: Balanced path between speed and structure.

variants.label: Variant 3
variants.architecture: Componentized implementation with stronger data and workflow separation.

business.author: General AI
business.text: Am notat direcția: "ciau vreau aplcatie erol". O folosesc pentru documentația website-ului. Spune-mi simplu: Cine sunt utilizatorii principali și ce rol au?

business.author: General AI
business.text: Am destul context ca să construiesc documentația completă pentru website. Avem deja obiectivul, audiența, scope-ul și recomandările tehnice de bază. Dacă ești ok, mergem mai departe și generez brief-ul complet din conversația noastră.

business.author: General AI

ciau vreau aplcatie erol

files.name: generated-implementation.ts
selected-story.md
files.content:
# US-01 Story 1: Ciau Vreau Aplcatie Erol

## Summary
As a erol, I want ciau vreau aplcatie erol available in the workflow so that ciau vreau aplcatie erol.

## Tradeoff
Fastest path to delivery, with moderate structural flexibility.

files.name: selected-variant.md
files.content:
# US-01-VAR-02 Variant 2

## Team
Frontend + Backend + TL Beta

## Focus
Balance delivery speed with maintainable boundaries.

## Architecture
Layered flow with explicit orchestration and clearer separation of runtime data.

## Tradeoff
Balanced path between speed and structure.

## Pros
- Balanced maintenance cost
- Cleaner orchestration boundaries
- Good default choice

## Cons
- More coordination than Variant 1
- Slightly more code upfront

import { agentStatuses } from "@/components/agent-status" import { experienceHighlights, experienceQueue, experienceStats, previewMeta } from "@/lib/preview-data" export const heroTitle = "Ciau Vreau Aplcatie Erol Runtime" export const heroSubtitle = "Preview the ciau vreau aplcatie erol flow directly from generated workspace files." export const primaryCta = "Add to cart" export const secondaryCta = "Open category" export const stageItems = [ "Brief approved", "Ciau Vreau Aplcatie Erol", "Story 1: Ciau Vreau Aplcatie Erol", "Variant 2", "Preview generated" ] export const feedItems = [ "Selected feature: Ciau Vreau Aplcatie Erol", "Selected story: Story 1: Ciau Vreau Aplcatie Erol", "Chosen variant: Variant 2 · Balance delivery speed with maintainable boundaries.", "Preview generated from the persistent backend workspace." ] const shellStyle = { minHeight: "100vh", padding: "32px", background: "linear-gradient(180deg, #fff8f1 0%, #fffdf8 100%)", color: "#1f2937", fontFamily: ""Space Grotesk", "Segoe UI", sans-serif", } const heroCardStyle = { borderRadius: "28px", padding: "28px", background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #f97316 0%, #fb7185 100%)", color: "white", boxShadow: "0 24px 60px rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.22)", } const statGridStyle = { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr))", gap: "12px", marginTop: "18px", } const statCardStyle = { borderRadius: "18px", padding: "14px", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.18)", backdropFilter: "blur(8px)", } const contentGridStyle = { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1.2fr 0.8fr", gap: "18px", marginTop: "18px", } const panelStyle = { borderRadius: "24px", border: "1px solid rgba(251, 113, 133, 0.16)", background: "white", padding: "22px", boxShadow: "0 18px 40px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08)", } const listCardStyle = { borderRadius: "18px", border: "1px solid rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08)", padding: "14px", marginTop: "12px", background: "#fffaf5", } export default function Page() { return (

issues.title: Authentication and authorization are not explicit in the implementation plan
issues.detail: Brief-ul și requirements-urile nu definesc clar controlul de acces pentru echipă și proiecte.
issues.remediation: Adaugă auth, roluri și project scoping explicit înainte de merge.
